name: covid_cough_detection
description: COVID-19 Cough Detection System - Enterprise Edition

scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter client run dev" "pnpm --filter server run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter client run build && pnpm --filter server run build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter client run check && pnpm --filter server run check
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter client run lint && pnpm --filter server run lint
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter client run clean && pnpm --filter server run clean
